messages.content: I'm sorry, I need context or the specific words to be translated in order to provide an answer. Please provide me with the sentence or phrase you wish to have translated.
ジョニーの部屋にベッドがふたつ並んでいるウィルの部屋から運び込んだものだった
"It was something that they had moved from Will's room, where there were two beds lined up, to Johnny's room."
The thing that was moved into Johnny's room from Will's room was two beds placed side by side.
【ジョニー】はあはあ……腕がダルい……ベッドってなんでこんなに重いんだ……
"Johnny: (panting) My arms are tired... Why are beds so heavy...?"
【ジョニー】でもこれでプレイの幅が広がるぞ！4人でくんずほぐれつ……ぐへへへへ！
"Johnny: But now our play options have expanded! Four people can sit and relax... Hehehehe!"
【クロエ】でどういうふうにするんだ？
"Chloe: How are we going to use it with me?"
"What are we going to do with Chloe?"
"でどういうふうにするんだ？"
"In what way are we going to use it with Chloe?"
でどういうふうにするんだ？
"What are we going to do with Chloe, then?"
